title: CreateZ
description: A LevelZ Addon for the Create mod. With New Age support.
body:
A LevelZ Addon for the Create mod, with support for Create: New Age.

This addon adds level requirements for blocks, tools and armor in the Create mod to fit seemlessly with LevelZ. This way these items will fit in seamlessly within your level Z mod packs.

Did I miss something or do you have any further suggestions for other mods I should make compatible? Follow the discord link and let me know!
